case_title: MARK A BENJAMIN VS. LOOKSMART, LTD.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN, MARK A

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BENJAMIN, MARK A RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LOOKSMART, LTD. $33,719.46 PRINCIPAL, $52.62 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,772.08, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT CONFIRMING AWARD OF ARBITRATOR

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED PETITIONER MARK A BENJAMIN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONER IS ENTITLED TO INTEREST UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS MAILED TO HIM. HE IS ALSO AWARDED COSTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; DECL OF TRENT J THORNLEY

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD CONTINUED FROM DEC-27-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JAN-07-2003, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER ORDER OF COURT. PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. MR. BENJAMIN DID NOT GIVE NOTICE OF INTENT TO ARGUE. THEREFORE, NO ARGUMENT WAS ENTERTAINED ON THIS MATTER. COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER TO J A N U A R Y 7, 2 0 0 3 FOR ARGUMENT. MR. BENJAMIN IS TO GIVE NOTICE IN WRITING OF THIS CONTINUANCE AND TO ADVISE THE OPPOSING PARTY THAT IT IS MANDATORY FOR THEM TO APPEAR FOR ARGUMENT. PERSONAL SERVICE OF NOTICE REQUIRED WITH A COURTESY COPY TO THE COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark A. Benjamin appeared in propria persona 255-6277, moving to confirm arbitration award
Trent J. Thornley, Esq., 760-1860, for respondent and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court granted Petitioner MARK A BENJAMIN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Petitioner is entitled to interest until the full amount of the arbitration award is mailed to him. He is also awarded costs. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

Continuance Of Motion To Order Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER MARK A BENJAMIN Continuance Of Motion To Order Arbitration Award --
Duplicate Entry. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-27-2002 Continued To Jan-07-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
PLAINTIFF MARK A BENJAMIN in propria persona 255-6277 or 269-1650 Petitioning to Confirm Arbitration Award
Mr. Benjamin did not give notice of intent to argue. Therefore, no argument was entertained on this matter. Court continued this matter to J A N U A R Y 7, 2 0 0 3 for argument. Mr. Benjamin is to give notice in writing of this continuance and to advise the opposing party that it is mandatory for them to appear for argument. Personal service of Notice required with a courtesy copy to the Court. (JJM/301/cl) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
